name: @databridge/migration-policy
description: Phase J2 — migration-policy DSL. Declares the ten policy slots called out in the gap analysis (CRN gen, scj_code attempt, multi-curriculum collapse, component-mark preservation, credit-hour→CATS, grade-scheme, term→AY, fee-status, classification gap, intercalation). Zod-typed schema with defaults; JSON-from-disk loader and example bundles.
